Organisation Transformation

People, culture, and capability building to sustain growth

Scale demands new structures, new skills, and new ways of working. We help you build the organisation that your strategy requires — from org design and talent frameworks to leadership development and culture transformation. We work at the intersection of strategy and people, because execution depends on both.

Book an Organisation Health CheckTake the AI Assessment →

Engagements starting from ₹1,25,000. Get a custom quote →

The challenges we solve

"We're scaling fast but everyone reports to the founder"

The founder-centric org design that works at ₹10 Cr breaks at ₹50 Cr. Redesigning from a hub-and-spoke to a distributed, accountable structure is one of the most high-impact and underinvested moves a scaling business can make.

"Good people keep leaving — and we don't fully understand why"

Retention problems are usually symptoms of structural issues — unclear career paths, poor management quality, misaligned performance systems, or a culture that doesn't match the organisation's stated values. Our culture diagnostics go below the surface.

"Our managers are great individual contributors but struggle as people leaders"

Promoting your best performers into management without equipping them for the role is the most common talent mistake growing businesses make. Our management capability programs build practical people leadership skills that drive team performance.

"Strategy is clear at the top — but doesn't translate into daily team decisions"

Execution failure is almost always an alignment failure. OKRs, performance management, and management cadences convert strategic intent into the daily decisions of your frontline teams.

Our approach

01

Org Health Diagnostic

360-degree organisational health assessment: structure, spans, culture, talent depth, engagement, and people systems. Benchmark against high-growth Indian companies of similar scale.

02

Design Principles & Target Model

Co-design with leadership: articulate the organisation design principles that must hold (e.g., customer proximity, speed, ownership). Design the target operating model.

03

Org Structure Redesign

Design the new structure: reporting lines, spans, role accountabilities, decision rights, and critical new roles required. Run a talent mapping exercise against the new structure.

04

People Systems Design

Design or redesign: performance management system, grading and compensation framework, career architecture, OKR methodology, and talent review process.

05

Capability Building

Design and deliver targeted capability programmes: management excellence, leadership acceleration, technical reskilling. Build internal L&D capability.

06

Culture Activation

Define culture explicitly: values, behaviours, rituals, and recognition. Cascade culture through management behaviours and performance system alignment.

What you receive

Every engagement produces tangible deliverables you own — living documents built to guide your team after the engagement ends.

  • Organisational Health Assessment report
  • Target Organisation Design (structure charts, RACI, accountabilities)
  • Talent mapping against new structure with gap analysis
  • Performance Management System design
  • Career architecture and grading framework
  • OKR implementation guide and cascade template
  • Management capability development programme
  • Culture Activation Plan: values, behaviours, rituals, recognition

Sector applications

How we apply this discipline in your sector.

Key challenges

  • Shop floor culture
  • Multi-shift management
  • Contractor workforce alignment
  • Technical skill gaps

What we do

  • Shift supervisor development programme for multi-shift operations
  • Technical skills taxonomy and reskilling roadmap for Industry 4.0
  • Contractor management governance and performance framework
  • Kaizen culture embedding through visual management and idea systems

Client story

“A steel component manufacturer found that 60% of quality issues traced back to shift handover breakdown. A supervisor development programme and standardised handover protocol reduced quality-related downtime by 45% in 6 months.”
